description_long: This vase features a tall, slender neck that gracefully widens into a bulbous base, creating an elegant teardrop silhouette. The surface is a deep, matte brown adorned with striking, irregular white streaks that flow vertically, giving the piece a dynamic, organic appearance. The white patterns vary in thickness and curvature, wrapping around the body and adding visual interest from every angle. The neck is smooth and unadorned, emphasizing the contrast between the plain upper section and the decorated lower body. The overall form suggests a modern, artistic style suitable for contemporary urban environments. The vase appears well-crafted, with no visible imperfections or damage.
description: A tall, teardrop-shaped vase with a matte brown finish and bold, irregular white streaks wrapping around its bulbous base. The design is modern and visually striking.
description_view_0: The front view highlights the widest part of the vase, showcasing three prominent white streaks curving across the brown surface.
description_view_1: This side view reveals a narrower profile with two thinner white streaks, one more prominent than the other, and more brown surface visible.
description_view_2: The back view displays a single, central white streak running vertically, with the rest of the surface mostly brown.
description_view_3: This view shows a large, sweeping white streak that curves dramatically, creating a bold visual contrast against the brown background.
